character.description: compact right-facing school ghost girl boss: pale ghost child, dark purple flowing hair mass, white school dress, red eye accent, friendly spooky silhouette

chroma_key.name: cyan
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 4 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: subtle three-frame idle hover: a compact cute-spooky school ghost girl gently rises, settles, and returns; her hair mass, sleeves, dress hem, and shoes shift slightly while the feet share a stable baseline

style: The attached player anchor is the only style SSoT: cute-spooky child-friendly Halloween painterly cartoon, compact chibi silhouette, saturated colors, thick dark outline, soft fixed-top-light shading, warm painted texture, readable at small game size. Draw a new character from the text description; do not copy any flat vector or realistic reference style. No thin outlines, no anime key art, no photorealism.
